candidates.why: Most direct top-line revenue line; populated and matches sales/revenue concept.
Also a valid total revenue line and appears equal to reported revenue; useful as fallback if label changes over time.

variables.notes: Priority list of revenue labels; later code should take first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Best direct production/service cost line; standard COGS-style row above gross profit.
Valid total cost of revenue alternative, but less preferred than the more direct operating revenue cost line.

variables.notes: Selected the most direct cost-of-revenue line rather than subtotal/alternatives.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Candidate is close to SG&A overhead, but it excludes R&D and is not the explicit populated SG&A total line requested by the hierarchy.
Component of SG&A, but incomplete because separate R&D and depreciation rows are also present.
Too broad because it includes COGS; not appropriate when explicit SG&A exists.

variables.notes: R:nc. The candidate list misses the best explicit populated SG&A row. Per hierarchy, when an explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, select only that row. Chose row from full preview outside candidates: 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total'. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above operating profit; ideal XRD mapping.
Valid supplemental R&D line, but the primary income statement line is preferred.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line exists above operating profit. XSGA uses total SG&A, so mapping XRD separately is appropriate for the PROF subtraction.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most direct recurring interest expense line; preferred over broader net finance rows and over generic 'Interest Expense' duplicate.
Also a direct interest expense label and numerically matches the preferred row; useful fallback if labels change.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Chose granular recurring interest expense and avoided net finance totals to prevent mixing in non-interest items.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line; excludes minority interest and fits BE definition.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent owner equity label and good fallback if naming changes over time.
Also appears to represent parent/common equity excluding minority interest; reasonable fallback.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list uses parent/common equity lines to exclude non-controlling interests from BE.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet non-controlling interest line; best match for MIB.
Equivalent minority interest label and suitable fallback if reporting label changes.

variables.notes: Priority list of non-controlling interest labels; later code should take first non-missing value.
